text.message: Wanna trade me a couple of woods to not go there?
but not all at once okay ?
Aight. You'll prob have more than enough of it anyways
Assume you're not going for my port, blue?
This is not a fight you'll want to start lol
I have no game if you take my port. I will solo you the rest of the game if that happens. Should be obvious lol
i owe u wood red 1 more
Blue took my last so I want it
If you promise not to go for my port
I must have a pop here or blue will prob take army
Yeah 4:1 it all wouldn’t be great
So the mono wont really be good
Save a wheat or sheep if possible
We will roll a six I believe
Can I at least get two ore?
Can't let all this ore stay in my hand
I really don’t want to give you this wheat
I mean, blue prob takes it with second mono
That would be a bad play I feel
He has so much ore already
Although the monos havent been the best
My last three points are extremely difficult while both of the others are a road away from 8 with space and flexible setups
Blue prob gonna take road at this rate
Can you explain to me how you think I'm the threat here?
Glad you constantly robbed me now blue?
He still can get it I think
Green would have won that turn
You are speaking the truth right here
Soo.. why have you constantly blocked me?
I used mono on wood against green earlier
2. You said "green might take it" literally the second after you robbed me
